ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CW101) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES department ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES department ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade_final" TEXT /* Final grade of the student */,
  "grade_midterm" TEXT /* Midterm grade of the student */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the student */,
  "withdrawn_date" TEXT /* Date if the student withdraws from the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_points" REAL /* Numerical grade points */,
  "predicted_score" TEXT /* Predicted score based on historical data */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "peer_feedback" TEXT /* Peer feedback on the assignment */,
  "self_assessment" TEXT /* Self-assessment by the student */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., formative, summative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points the assignment is worth */,
  "rubric" TEXT /* Grading rubric for the assignment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assignment in the final grade */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., essay, research paper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade record */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who graded the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, graded) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the submission */,
  "peer_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peer reviewer */,
  "self_assessment_text" TEXT /* Self-assessment text by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_peer_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("peer_reviewer_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chairperson */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES chairpersons ("chairperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chairpersons" (
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chairperson */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the chairperson */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the chairperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the chairperson */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the chairperson leads */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the chairperson's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the chairperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chairperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chairpersons_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES department ("department_id")
)
